demographics.living_situation: lives at home with both parents

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: Please help — the skin on my baby's bottom looks completely raw and burned, and he screams in agony every time he wees. It's been getting worse for three days and now it's weeping. He's barely feeding and won't stop crying and we're exhausted.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The rash has got much worse over the last day, the skin looks raw and shiny, and he's so distressed during nappy changes and weeing that he's hardly eating or sleeping.

symptom_narrative.onset: about 3 days ago, starting a day or two after he had a tummy bug with lots of watery poos
symptom_narrative.character: started as mild redness, now the skin over his bottom, lower tummy and privates is bright red, shiny and looks chapped and raw
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's been — it looks like a burn and he screams whenever wee or poo touches it
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: over the rounded parts of his bottom, lower tummy and the genital area — the deep creases look okay to us
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant, and much worse right after he wees or does a poo, and during nappy changes
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing we've tried — the thin lotion we put on hasn't helped at all
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: wee and poo sitting against the skin, and wiping him
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: he's very unsettled and crying a lot, and has fed poorly for the last 12 hours because of the pain
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: he's had mild nappy rashes before but nothing like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: not sleeping or feeding well because of the pain

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: recent viral tummy bug with frequent loose stools, now settling

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: a thin water-based baby lotion we've been putting on the rash

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: infant fully dependent on parents; both parents present and very anxious and sleep-deprived

objective_data_offered.value: 37.0 degrees C on our home thermometer
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single home reading; infant not obviously hot to the parents

objective_data_offered.value: about 8.5 kg on our baby scales

bright red, shiny, glazed rash over the rounded surfaces of the buttocks, lower abdomen and genitals; the deep groin and buttock creases look spared and normal; no obvious small spreading spots or blisters seen by the parents
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: phone-camera view under home lighting; parent-directed, not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: he is alert and crying vigorously, cries hardest when the nappy is taken off and when he wees; his mouth looks moist and he is still having some wet nappies
we've been using standard commercial baby wipes (they contain alcohol and fragrance) at every change
